basic_details.job_title: DMHO Mahabubabad Senior Treatment Lab Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Medical and Health Office Mahabubabad (DMHO Mahabubabad)
basic_details.short_information: District Medical and Health Office Mahabubabad (DMHO Mahabubabad) Senior Treatment Lab Supervisor (STLS) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website www.mahabubabad.telangana.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMHO Mahabubabad Senior Treatment Lab Supervisor (STLS) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 46 years Age Relaxation: For SCs, STs, BCs & EWS: 5 years; For Ex-service men: 3 years and length of service in armed forces; For NCC (Instructor): 3 years and length of service; For Physically challenged: 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent from a govt. recognized Institution, Permanent two wheeler driving license & should be able to drive two wheeler, Certificate Course in computer operations (minimum two months), Minimum one year of experience in NTEP (preferential)
qualification.details: Graduate or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent from a govt. recognized Institution. Permanent two-wheeler driving license and should be able to drive a two-wheeler. Certificate Course in computer operations (minimum two months). Minimum one year of experience in NTEP (preferential).

selection_process: Merit List (90 marks from qualifying examination + 10 marks for age) Display of provisional Merit List & Call for Objections Display of final merit list and selection list following Rule of Reservation Counselling
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mahabubabad.telangana.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMHO Mahabubabad STLS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DMHO Mahabubabad Senior Treatment Lab Supervisor (STLS) recruitment is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the STLS post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Treatment Lab Supervisor (STLS) post in the DMHO Mahabubabad recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the STLS post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduate or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent from a government-recognized institution, a permanent two-wheeler driving license, and a certificate course in computer operations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the STLS post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Senior Treatment Lab Supervisor (STLS) post is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 46 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, and SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the STLS post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a merit list based on qualifying examination marks and age, followed by the display of provisional and final merit lists, and counselling.

faq.question: Q8. Does the recruitment mention any preference for experience?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of one year of experience in NTEP is considered preferential for the Senior Treatment Lab Supervisor (STLS) post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DMHO Mahabubabad?
faq.answer: The official website for DMHO Mahabubabad is www.mahabubabad.telangana.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.
